script:
#!/bin/bash
set +e
echo '========================================'
echo 'PHASE 1: UFW FIREWALL'
echo '========================================'

# Ensure UFW is installed
apt-get install -y ufw 2>/dev/null | tail -1

# CRITICAL: Allow SSH FIRST before enabling
ufw allow 22/tcp comment 'SSH'
ufw allow 80/tcp comment 'HTTP Traefik'
ufw allow 443/tcp comment 'HTTPS Traefik'

# Enable firewall
ufw --force enable

echo ''
echo '--- UFW STATUS ---'
ufw status verbose
ufw status numbered

echo ''
echo '========================================'
echo 'PHASE 2: SSH HARDENING'
echo '========================================'

# Check SSH key exists
KEY_COUNT=$(wc -l < /root/.ssh/authorized_keys 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
echo "SSH keys found: $KEY_COUNT"

if [ "$KEY_COUNT" -gt 0 ]; then
  echo 'SSH key found — proceeding with hardening'
  
  # Backup
  cp /etc/ssh/sshd_config /etc/ssh/sshd_config.backup.$(date +%s)
  
  # Apply hardening
  sed -i 's/^#\?PermitRootLogin.*/PermitRootLogin prohibit-password/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config
  sed -i 's/^#\?PasswordAuthentication.*/PasswordAuthentication no/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config
  sed -i 's/^#\?ChallengeResponseAuthentication.*/ChallengeResponseAuthentication no/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config
  
  # Verify config before restart
  if sshd -t 2>&1; then
    echo 'Config OK — restarting sshd'
    systemctl restart sshd
    echo 'sshd restarted successfully'
  else
    echo 'CONFIG ERROR — NOT restarting sshd!'
    cp /etc/ssh/sshd_config.backup.* /etc/ssh/sshd_config 2>/dev/null
    echo 'Backup restored'
  fi
  
  echo ''
  echo '--- SSH CONFIG AFTER ---'
  grep -E 'PermitRootLogin|PasswordAuthentication|ChallengeResponseAuthentication' /etc/ssh/sshd_config | grep -v '^#'
else
  echo 'WARNING: No SSH key found! Skipping SSH hardening to preserve access.'
fi

echo ''
echo '========================================'
echo 'PHASE 3: FAIL2BAN'
echo '========================================'

apt-get update -qq 2>/dev/null | tail -3
apt-get install -y fail2ban 2>/dev/null | tail -3

cat > /etc/fail2ban/jail.local << 'EOF'
[DEFAULT]
bantime = 3600
findtime = 600
maxretry = 5
backend = systemd

[sshd]
enabled = true
port = ssh
filter = sshd
maxretry = 3
bantime = 86400
EOF

systemctl enable fail2ban
systemctl restart fail2ban
sleep 2

echo '--- FAIL2BAN STATUS ---'
fail2ban-client status
fail2ban-client status sshd

echo ''
echo '========================================'
echo 'PHASES 1-3 COMPLETE'
echo '========================================'
intent: Phase 1-3: UFW firewall + SSH hardening + fail2ban
